name: Stone Garden
tagline: Find the signal in the noise.
bestFor: Separating meaningful patterns from operational noise
Synthesizing competing signals into clearer strategic focus
Helping leaders slow down before committing movement

steps.label: REFLECT
steps.caption: Pause long enough to see what is actually present.

steps.label: SYNTHESIZE
steps.caption: Combine signals, tensions, and evidence into clearer themes.

steps.label: CENTER
steps.caption: Establish a calm, aligned view before advancing.

capabilities.label: QDS
capabilities.description: Future qualification support for evidence sufficiency and confidence framing.

capabilities.label: Docente
capabilities.description: Future learning layer for capturing reflection and adapting leadership judgment.

integrationSlots.label: QDS Evidence Check
